summary: P0 Transfers Router Extraction VALIDATED - All 15 backend tests passed, frontend Transfers Queue working correctly. Status tabs (SUBMITTED/COMPLETED/REJECTED), pagination, and search all functional. Fixed critical bug in routers/dependencies.py where FINANCE_OPS and COMPLIANCE_OFFICER roles were missing from require_admin.

features_tested.search_functionality: PASS - Searches across beneficiary, sender, email, IBAN, reference
features_tested.sender_info_bulk_lookup: PASS - sender_name, sender_email, sender_iban included in response
features_tested.soft_delete_exclusion: PASS - is_deleted transfers excluded from listing

performance_metrics.note: All within baseline variance - no N+1 regression

critical_bug_fixed.issue: require_admin() was missing FINANCE_OPS and COMPLIANCE_OFFICER roles
critical_bug_fixed.impact: These roles would have been blocked from admin transfers panel
critical_bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added FINANCE_OPS and COMPLIANCE_OFFICER to allowed roles list

critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: routers/dependencies.py require_admin now includes FINANCE_OPS, COMPLIANCE_OFFICER roles (matching server.py)
Router extraction preserves 100% behavior parity with original server.py implementation
Bulk lookups for sender info (users_map, accounts_map) correctly preserved - no N+1 regression
Soft-delete transfers correctly excluded from all listings
Transfer Restore endpoint correctly NOT implemented (returns 404 as specified)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data (READ ONLY)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Transfers router extraction validated. All endpoints working correctly from new routers/transfers.py. Fixed missing roles in dependencies.py. Frontend Transfers Queue page works via sidebar navigation (/admin?section=ledger route). Direct /admin/transfers route shows 'No routes matched' - this is a frontend routing quirk, not a backend issue.
rca_of_issue: Critical bug in routers/dependencies.py - require_admin function only allowed ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN roles, while server.py version also allows FINANCE_OPS and COMPLIANCE_OFFICER. Fixed by updating the role list to match server.py implementation.
